name: Claude Code
mcp: Use project .mcp.json and configured Claude Code MCP settings.
permissions: Use Claude Code settings and hooks to constrain tools and external side effects.
autonomy: Headless and streaming loops require explicit wall-clock budgets, retry limits, and human checkpoints.
evidence_capture: Use hooks, transcript output, command logs, and artifacts; retain only sanitized public synthesis.
handoff: Handoff through KBD waypoint files, summary artifacts, and committed evidence.
recovery: When hooks or handoffs fail, stop at the KBD gate and repair missing artifacts before continuing.
public_boundary_verification: A Claude Code producer needs a separate critic pass and public-boundary evidence before completion.
